feedback.text: I kindly urge you to consider including video games as a recognized art form within your Digital Fairness Act. The current state of the industry often misleads consumers in a way that would be similar to purchasing a work of art only to have it forcefully revoked upon the artist's passing without ever mentioning this would be the case when the purchase were being made. Like any other media, video games serve as cultural and artistic reflections of their time and deserve to be preserved and archived for future generations. Thank you for you consideration.
